entities.summary: User-facing API class for simple text generation

detail.name: LLM
detail.description: High-level interface wrapping LLMEngine. Handles tokenization, generation, and detokenization in one call.

teaches.explain: Simplest possible interface for end users. Hides tokenization, batching, scheduling complexity. One method: generate(prompt) → text.
Single entry point wrapping multiple subsystems. User doesnt need to know about Engine, Scheduler, or ModelRunner.
